case_id: Unique identifier for each medical case.
tumor_included_for_the_study: Indicator if tumor sample is included in the study.
normal_included_for_the_study: Indicator if normal sample is included in the study.
histology_diagnosis: Histological diagnosis of the tumor, typically PDAC (Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma).
age: Age of the participant at the time of diagnosis.
tumor_site: Location of the tumor within the organ.
tumor_focality: Description of tumor growth pattern, whether unifocal or multifocal.
tumor_necrosis: Indicates if tumor necrosis is identified (Not identified).
lymph_vascular_invasion: Indicates presence of lymph vascular invasion (Not identified, Present).
number_of_lymph_nodes_positive_for_tumor: Number of lymph nodes positive for tumor.
pathologic_staging_regional_lymph_nodes_: Pathologic staging for regional lymph nodes (pN1, pN2).
pathologic_staging_primary_tumor_pt: Pathologic staging for primary tumor (pT2, pT3).
pathologic_staging_distant_metastasis_pm: Pathologic staging for distant metastasis (pMX, pM0).
clinical_staging_distant_metastasis_cm: Clinical staging for distant metastasis (cM0, cMX).
residual_tumor: Classification of residual tumor presence and size after treatment.
tumor_stage_pathological: Pathological stage of the tumor (categorized as I, II, III, IV).
additional_pathologic_findings: Description of any additional pathologic findings or conditions.
bmi: Body Mass Index (BMI) of the patient.
alcohol_consumption: Description of patient's alcohol consumption habits.
tobacco_smoking_history: Description of patient's tobacco smoking history.
medical_condition: List of medical conditions and family history of the patient.
Neoplastic_cellularity: Percentage of neoplastic cells in the sample.
Acinar_fraction: Fraction of acinar cells in the sample.
Islet_fraction: Fraction of islet cells in the sample.
Stromal_fraction: Percentage of stromal tissue in the sample.
Fat_fraction: Percentage of fat tissue in the sample.
Inflammation_fraction: Percentage of inflamed tissue in the sample.
Muscle_fraction: Percentage of muscle tissue in the sample.
follow_up_days: Number of days from initial observation to follow-up.
vital_status: Patient's status at the end of the observation period.
is_this_patient_lost_to_follow_up: Indicator if the patient was lost to follow-up.
cause_of_death: Cause of death for deceased patients.
